professors.Name: Robert Warren Howarth
professors.Research Area: the biogeochemical feedbacks which may either aggravate or partially ameliorate eutrophication that occurs in seagrass-dominated systems as nutrient loads increase
professors.Why Interesting?: 我11年级的科研项目是水中微塑料对无脊椎动物的影响

professors.Name: K. Max Zhang
professors.Research Area: how solar panels can boost crops
professors.Why Interesting?: 1、教授本科是天津大学的，我的外婆是天津人，亲切。2、AI正在受到电力基建的制约，使我开始关注太阳能等清洁能源的研究
